## Proceed with Consortium Bid Desk

I want to start a paid Consortium Bid Desk.

## Scope acknowledged

- Setup fee: KRW 30,000,000 setup, payable before kickoff
- Monthly fee: KRW 12,000,000/month
- Minimum: 90-day minimum
- Deliverables: buyer/member intake matrix, fit scoring, evidence checklist, proposal-room templates, operating cadence, and weekly review call
- Guardrail: No work starts before payment is confirmed
- Outcome boundary: No guarantee of grant, voucher, procurement, pilot, funding, contract, or sales outcome
